title: Navigation regression after v2.4.0 deployment
description: Following the deployment of v2.4.0 on x86-warehouse-03, the navigation planner began producing suboptimal paths with increased replanning frequency. Path computation time increased by 3x compared to the previous v2.3.1 deployment, causing intermittent goal timeouts.
root_cause: New costmap algorithm in v2.4.0 has a performance regression on large warehouse maps. The inflation radius calculation was changed, causing excessive obstacle dilation.
